channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Los Angeles may have its own Zohran in the form of ex-reality star Spencer Pratt
item.description: Running as a Republican, Pratt is shaking up the race with viral videos targeting Mayor Karen Bass, Gov. Gavin Newsom, and others.

item.title: King Charles lays out government agenda as Starmer fights for survival: 'absolutely preposterous'
item.description: The day in Parliament was marked by stark contrasts.

item.title: America's data centers are thirsty. Rural towns are paying the price—from tanked water pressure to stolen desert groundwater
item.description: Residents in various states questioned why their water was being diverted to data centers instead of their homes in water-scarce areas.

item.title: Debbie Gibson and Black Sabbath's Geezer Butler urge adoption of beagles rescued from Wisconsin lab
item.description: The musician and the pop star called for safe homes for the rescued dogs.
